extDescription.message: Transcribe WhatsApp Web voice messages via OpenRouter.

optionsIntro.message: Set your OpenRouter API key and audio-capable models. Model list: openrouter.ai/models?input_modalities=audio

modelsHint.message: One model per line. First is primary; OpenRouter tries the rest on provider errors.

languageHint.message: Short code (e.g. pt, en). Leave empty for automatic detection in the prompt.

errorNoApiKey.message: Set the API key in the extension options.

errorExtensionReloaded.message: The extension was reloaded. Refresh this WhatsApp tab (F5) and try again.
